sourcesContent: var r={background:"rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)",borderColor:"rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)",padding:"0.5rem",borderRadius:"{border.radius.xl}"},o={borderRadius:"{content.border.radius}",padding:"0.5rem",size:"3rem",focusRing:{width:"{focus.ring.width}",style:"{focus.ring.style}",color:"{focus.ring.color}",offset:"{focus.ring.offset}",shadow:"{focus.ring.shadow}"}},d={root:r,item:o};export{d as default,o as item,r as root};
